name: In New York, can I sue Perplexity even if I'm in California?
description: Yes, NY jurisdiction sticks per court rulings.[1][4]

mainEntity.name: In New York, can I sue Perplexity even if I'm in California?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, NY jurisdiction sticks per court rulings.[1][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, NY federal courts have jurisdiction over Perplexity due to employee hiring and business contacts there.[1][4] Cases like Dow Jones proceed despite nationwide parties.[5] Key factors: Personal jurisdiction upheld; venue denial.[4] File where harm occurs or Perplexity operates. CA residents joined NY suits. Consult local counsel for multi-state.
